text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day in my office, shortly before the autumn
Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's phone receives some kind of
notification. She takes a look, and...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What in the—?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: My mother is coming to watch the Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She also said she wants to meet you while she's
here...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We can't just sit around! Everything must be
perfect!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Preparations start now! You're helping, and that's an order!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From what Air Groove has told me about her
mother, I always got the impression that she's
cheerful and friendly, but maybe she's one of
those people who get scary when they're angry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Under Air Groove's firm instruction, I dash about
making preparations and ensuring that my office
is spotless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day comes, and the time of Air Groove's
mother's visit draws near.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You look well put together today. Try your best
to maintain that look.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
D-don't be foolish! Wh-why would I be nervous
about seeing my own mother?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If it were just me, I wouldn't be... Argh! Just don't
say anything unnecessary, are we clear?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: There you are! It's been so long, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Mother!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume is waving her hand at us. It's
evident that she's Air Groove's mother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's far more lively than I imagined—quite
different from Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for barging in practically unannounced, but
I just had to see you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for making the time to come. We
shouldn't just stand here all day, though. Follow
me—I've prepared a place we can sit down and
talk.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Prepared as ever! It's hard to believe you're my daughter! Oh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You must be Air Groove's trainer. What a
pleasure it is to meet you! Thank you for looking
after her!
choice_data_list: It's nice to meet you too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I hope she hasn't been any trouble. She can be
quite prickly sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: P-please, Mother! Let's not talk about that!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
But why? It's the truth, isn't it? You've always
been a shy one.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: P-please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Air Groove is no match for her
mother...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's face flushes red with embarrassment.
It's such a rare sight that I can't help but smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I show Air Groove's mother to my office.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: So this is where you two plan your races and such!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hm hmm! I see, I see. Ooh! Are these New Year's
decorations stored here?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes. We decorate the office every year.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I make sure to observe each holiday and
appreciate every aspect of the year, just as you
taught me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Hehe, is that right?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Look at your office. Not a single New Year's
decoration in sight.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Seasonal events provide color and variety to our
daily lives. If you wish to have a fulfilling year,
you should pay them more attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see... So this is where Air Groove gets her
passion for seasonal events from.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Please, have a seat and make yourself
comfortable. I'll go brew some tea.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to ask me twice! Ahhh, it's so nice
to be off my feet!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer. Have you two been enjoying
any festivals and such?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you're well aware, but she's so bad at
relaxing. I don't know where she got it from, but
she always works so hard!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
She'd never take a break unless someone
practically forced her, so I used to drag her off to
festivals whenever I had the chance!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Well, maybe I was a little selfish. Just a mother
who loves festivals and wanted to spend time with
her daughter.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Thankfully, she always enjoyed it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
But while I was just grateful she was relaxing,
festivals became a super serious thing for her!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, I just thought you might understand
how I feel. I just worry about her sometimes.
choice_data_list: We have our share of fun together.
We have our share of fun together.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's a relief! I hope you'll keep enjoying
her "festivals" with her, whatever form they might
take.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Air Groove comes back with some tea
and the three of us have a pleasant conversation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from the smile on her face, it seems like
Air Groove is delighted to chat with her mom in
person after so long.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, look at the time! I lost track with all the
fun we were having! I need to check in to my
hotel.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I could talk with the both of you. I feel
so relieved.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It was my pleasure.
choice_data_list: I had a nice time too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh, did you now?! Well, I have so much more I could talk about! Like how Air Groove was so scared of lightning when she was little, and—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Mother! Didn't you say you need to check in to
your hotel?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh yes, of course! Right, I'll get out of your hair
now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Hey, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: I meant what I said earlier, you know.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: About what?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: I really am relieved. I was so worried about you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I know you're ever so capable and talented, but
you can be so uncompromising!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You're too tough on yourself! Sometimes you
push yourself so hard it leaves me a little shaken.
There's such a thing as moderation, you know.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sh-shaken?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
But from what I saw today, I can tell there's a lot
more to your attitude than just strictness these
days.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You seem so much more proud and confident
when you're with your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: I hope you continue to support Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I truly believe she's changed for the better—all
thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: And you, Air Groove. Take care of your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I will.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Just to be clear, I also believe in my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Air Groove! Relax those shoulders! You're
still so rigid! Be more honest with yourself, okay?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll... see what I can do...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: I hope I'm getting through to you. Silly girl...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm off. Good luck in the Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's mother was full of energy the entire
visit.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you for talking with my mother.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: She... seemed really happy.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm proud to be her daughter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before her biggest race yet, I catch a glimpse
of a completely new side of Air Groove.
